title: App CSS - Global Styles and Theming
content:
This file defines the global CSS styles and theming for the DocMed application. It sets up basic element resets, defines color palettes for dark and light themes, and styles core layout components, UI elements, and markdown rendering.

### Global Styles

- **Reset:** `*, *::before, *::after` provides a basic CSS reset for box-sizing, margin, and padding.
- **Typography:** Sets the default font family (`sans-serif`), background color (`--bg`), text color (`--text`), line height, and font size for the `body`.

### Theming

- **CSS Variables:** Utilizes CSS custom properties (`--var-name`) for theming.
- **Dark Theme:** Defined on `:root` and `[data-theme="dark"]`, featuring a dark background with muted accent colors.
- **Light Theme:** Defined on `[data-theme="light"]`, with a light background and brighter accent colors.

### Key Components Styled

- **Layout:** `.layout`, `.main-column` establish the main flexbox-based layout.
- **Tab Bar:** `.tab-bar`, `.tab-list`, `.tab`, `.tab-close`, `.tab-add` style the file tab interface.
- **Sidebar:** `.sidebar`, `.sidebar-collapsed`, `.sidebar-top`, `.repo-title`, `.theme-toggle`, `.collapse-btn`, `.sidebar-body` style the navigation sidebar.
- **Search:** `.search-wrap`, `.search-icon`, `.search-input`, `.search-clear` style the search functionality.
- **Navigation:** `.nav`, `.nav-item`, `.nav-badge`, `.nav-section-label`, `.nav-empty` style the navigation links and sections.
- **File Tree:** `.tree-level`, `.tree-row`, `.tree-folder-row`, `.tree-chevron-btn`, `.tree-folder-label`, `.tree-chevron`, `.tree-icon`, `.tree-name`, `.tree-children` style the file and folder tree view.
- **Main Content:** `.main`, `.page`, `.page-title`, `.page-subtitle` style the main content area.
- **Stats:** `.stats-row`, `.stat-card`, `.stat-value`, `.stat-label` style various statistical cards.
- **Home Sections:** `.section-title`, `.file-grid`, `.file-card`, `.file-card-name`, `.file-card-path`, `.file-card-title` style content sections on the home page.
- **Commits:** `.commit-list`, `.commit-item`, `.commit-sha`, `.commit-body`, `.commit-msg`, `.commit-meta` style commit log entries.
- **Doc Page:** `.doc-filepath` styles the file path for documentation pages.
- **Markdown:** `.markdown-body` and its descendants style the rendered markdown content, including headings, paragraphs, links, code blocks, lists, blockquotes, and tables.
- **Misc:** `.empty-state`, `.loading-pulse` provide styles for empty states and loading indicators.
- **Folder Group:** `.tree-folder-group` styles grouped folders in the tree.
- **Breadcrumb:** `.breadcrumb`, `.breadcrumb-item`, `.breadcrumb-sep`, `.breadcrumb-current`, `.breadcrumb-link` style the breadcrumb navigation.

### Usage

This file is intended to be imported once in the application's entry point (e.g., `App.js` or `index.js`) to apply global styles. The theming can be controlled by adding or removing the `data-theme="dark"` or `data-theme="light"` attribute to the `<html>` or `<body>` element.
